title: Station Upgrades
description: Station upgrades for storing feed, switching drivers, and other amenities. Upgraded stations provide better efficiency and enable longer routes by refreshing caravans mid-journey.
definition-of-done: Station upgrade tiers available. Upgrades provide specific benefits (feed storage, driver switch). Upgrade costs and prerequisites. Upgrade effects visible in route planning.
testing-plan: Verify upgrade purchase works. Test each upgrade benefit. Verify prerequisites enforced. Test effects in route planning.
todos: Build upgrade display in route planning
